issues.objection: A cynical writer's mocking gloss of 7.23 would target either (a) 'just commit to your stack, bro' or (b) 'work harder, but spiritual.' The engineering layer forecloses both: the falsifiability field explicitly rejects the soft reading; the counter_example carves out where the verse does not apply. The quotable_line ("Surface-mastery has the duration of the surface; substrate-mastery has the duration of distributed systems.…") is concrete enough to resist parody. This verse is sharp and operationally robust (per chapter-7 thesis: STRONG operational analog).

notes: Cynical-writer test for 7.23: identify the parody-handle. The verse does not give one — the engineering layer is anchored to specific tooling and configurations; the quotable line is testable on the artifact, not on affect. PASS.
